header.headline: IR Pipeline Flow
header.subtitle: A compact graph of how the training compiler turns scene and model contracts into a runnable runtime.

source.title: Scene + Weights
source.body: Start from the staged tokenizer, contract, and initialized weights.

ir1.title: IR1 Build
ir1.body: Build forward structure and fuse the stable graph skeleton.

lower.title: Lower + Layout
lower.body: Assign memory, lower call IR, and prepare execution-ready plans.

compile.title: Compile Runtime
compile.body: Generate C and compile the graph runtime into a shared library.

runtime.title: Runnable Runtime
runtime.body: The compiled artifact is ready for deterministic CK inference and probe evaluation.

footer.note: This holdout checks whether graph-family learning transfers to another compiler-oriented flow, not just the trained graph topics.
